visual_description: A man in a brown suit and white shirt rides a bicycle down a sunlit rural road, facing the camera with a focused expression. He holds the handlebars with both hands, his posture upright as he pedals. In the distance, a small group of people walks along the roadside.
audio_description: The audio features the steady sound of bicycle wheels rolling on pavement and a light breeze. No distinct speech or vocalizations are audible.
